name: adlc-backend
description: Thin backend domain for solo-scale products: modular-monolith architecture, API design, auth/identity, background jobs, and the game-server bits (leaderboards, authoritative sim re-validation, IAP server notifications). Managed services, no microservices/K8s. Routes deploy/observability to adlc-ops, security hardening to adlc-security, and the data layer (schema, migrations, queries, access) to adlc-database; keeps its own opinionated Postgres/Flyway stack.
